info.english_meaning: to shake to tremble to quake to shiver

upasarga_meanings.meaning: GabarAnA hicakicAnA jora se kAMpanA TaraTaranA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'svaDarmamapi cAvekzya na vikampitumarhasi' (gItA 231) vikampitum vicalitum vyaTitum vihvalitum
'svasTAnAnna vikampeta' (BA0 vi0 109) na vikampeta=na nivarteta na vyAvarteta svaM sTAnaM na rahayedityarTaH
'vadanaM tad vadAnyAyA vEdehyA na vikampate' (rA0 26017) nAsyA vAk sajjati BAzaBARAyA ityarTaH
'ASlizyamARaH priyayA SaNkaropi yadAjYayA utkampate saBuvanaM sa jayatyasamasAyakaH' (kaTA0 152).. utkampate'titarAM depate
'somavikrayiRaM hiraRyenABikampayati' (kA0 SrO0 7815) aBikampayati vicAlayati praloBayati garDayati
